description: A validation script for testing API input validation and database state, specifically testing rejection of nonsense input ('asdfghjkl') and ensuring no database record is created.

methods.name: env
methods.description: Retrieves environment variable value, returns null if not set or empty.

methods.name: requireEnv
methods.description: Retrieves required environment variable, throws error if not set.

methods.name: buildBaseUrl
methods.description: Constructs the base URL for API calls based on environment variables.

methods.name: buildPersonaGeneratePath
methods.description: Constructs the API endpoint path for persona generation.

methods.name: postJson
methods.description: Sends a POST request with JSON body and returns response details.

methods.name: mysqlPoolFromEnv
methods.description: Creates a MySQL connection pool based on environment variables.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Main async function executing the validation test: sending invalid input, checking API response, and verifying database state.
